Complete Suite

Why FinWise

Built on Transparency,
Not Commissions

Most financial platforms are paid to recommend specific products. We're not. FinWise exists to help you make better decisions, not to sell you financial products.

100% Independent Advice

Our advisors have no incentive to sell you anything. They are paid by you, not by product companies — ensuring completely unbiased guidance.

Zero conflict of interest

Verified Expert Advisors

Every advisor on FinWise is background-checked and holds valid SEBI, IRDAI, or AMFI registrations. Credentials verified, expertise guaranteed.

2,400+ verified professionals

Transparent Comparisons

Compare real interest rates, actual premiums, and true returns across products — no sponsored rankings, no paid placements, no hidden fees.

5,000+ products compared

100+ Financial Institutions

Access products from leading banks, NBFCs, insurance companies, and investment firms — all vetted and integrated into one platform.

HDFC, SBI, ICICI + 97 more

One Complete Ecosystem

Everything financial in one place — compare, connect, calculate, learn, apply, and communicate without ever switching platforms.

A-Z financial decisions

No Hidden Costs

Basic advisor browsing, product comparisons, and calculators are completely free. No subscriptions, no surprise charges, no upselling.

Always free to explore

Customer Stories

Real Decisions, Real Results

Over 1.8 lakh customers have made better financial decisions with FinWise.

“FinWise helped me understand which home loan was actually best for my situation. The advisor didn't push any product — she genuinely explained the differences and helped me save ₹4.2 lakhs over 20 years.”

₹4.2L savedvia Home Loan
AS

Ankit Sharma

Software Engineer, Bengaluru

“I had been paying 22% interest on a personal loan. My advisor on FinWise connected me to a balance transfer option at 11.5%. The platform is transparent and the advisors are genuinely expert.”

₹1.8L annual interest savedvia Loan Refinancing
MK

Meena Krishnan

Business Owner, Chennai

“We were confused about term insurance vs. whole life. The comparison tool made it crystal clear and we got a ₹2 crore term plan for just ₹18,000/year. Couldn't have done this without FinWise.”

₹2Cr coverage @ ₹18K/yrvia Term Insurance

Rahul & Smita Verma
